Headline: Closure - Abbotsholme School, Staffordshire
Info: Abbotsholme School, an independent day and boarding school, has announced its sudden and immediate closure for most pupils due to financial difficulties, leaving families urgently seeking alternative provision.

Headline: Closure - Manorbier Church in Wales VC School (State), Pembrokeshire
Info: The St Davids Diocese is threatening legal action against Pembrokeshire County Council over its plans to permanently close the fire-damaged Manorbier Church in Wales VC School, accusing the council of running a flawed consultation.

Headline: Closure - Branscombe C of E Primary School (State), Devon
Info: Link Multi Academy Trust has launched a consultation on the proposed permanent closure of Branscombe C of E Primary School by December 2026, citing a severe decline in pupil numbers and long-term viability concerns.

Headline: Merger - Soho Parish and All Souls Primary (State), London
Info: A proposed merger between Soho Parish and All Souls primary schools in Westminster has been abandoned after governors failed to reach an agreement, despite both state schools facing falling pupil rolls and financial pressures.
